mapper.select: SELECT acc.nickname AS nick, m.img_src AS mbtiSrc, m.img_src AS mbti, a.img_src AS aniSrc, a.img_src AS ani FROM account_tb acc JOIN mbti_tb m ON acc.mbti = m.mbti JOIN ani_tb a ON acc.ani = a.ani WHERE acc.id = #{id}

WITH user_key AS ( SELECT NVL(#{mbti, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(acc.mbti)) AS mbti, CASE WHEN NVL(#{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, acc.gender) IN ('M', '남자') THEN 'M' WHEN NVL(#{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, acc.gender) IN ('F', '여자') THEN 'F' ELSE NVL(#{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, acc.gender) END AS gender, NVL(#{ani, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(acc.ani)) AS ani FROM dual LEFT JOIN account_tb acc ON acc.id = #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) SELECT luck_ty, seq, luck FROM ( SELECT lt.luck_ty, lt.seq, lt.luck, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY lt.luck_ty ORDER BY ORA_HASH(uk.mbti || ':' || uk.gender || ':' || uk.ani || ':' || lt.luck_ty || ':' || lt.seq), lt.seq ) AS rn FROM luck_text_tb lt CROSS JOIN user_key uk WHERE lt.luck_ty IN (10, 20, 30, 40, 50) ) WHERE rn = 1
